title: Meet the Baron
writer: Herman J. Mankiewicz, Norman Krasna, Allen Rivkin
actors: Jack Pearl, Jimmy Durante, Zasu Pitts
plot: The famous Baron Munchausen dumps two dimwits in the African jungle. A rescue team mistakes one of them for the missing Baron, and returns them to the US, where they're greeted as heroes. While giving a speech at a college, the "B...
